title: IBKR TWS paper gateway integration test
notes: S6 execution imports ib_insync but has never connected to IBKR TWS. Need paper gateway (port 7497 from system.yaml). Unknown compatibility between ib_insync version and TWS API version. Risk guards may fail silently. Steps: install TWS or IB Gateway, start paper connection, run minimal order submission test (single LIMIT order for 1 share AAPL), verify fill tracking works. This is the highest-risk subsystem for paper trading.

title: FinBERT model weights must be pre-downloaded
notes: S5 sentiment/scorer.py calls pipeline('text-classification', model='ProsusAI/finbert') — this downloads ~500MB from HuggingFace on first invocation. Current container may not have HF cache dir. Need to: pre-download with transformers, verify GPU is available (cuda:0 from system.yaml), test inference on a sample headline. Fallback: CPU mode if GPU not available.

title: PostgreSQL must be running with schema applied
notes: pg_isready returns nothing in current container. Migration 0001_initial_schema.py exists and matches shared/models.py. Alembic ini is at repo root. Need: start PostgreSQL service, create algotrader DB, run alembic upgrade head, verify tables with python -c 'from algotrader.shared.db import init_db; init_db(...); from algotrader.shared.models import Job; print(Job.__table__)'.

title: Bootstrap: install script + DB init + directory setup
notes:
Script must: (1) create /mnt/hdd/algotrader/ dirs if missing, (2) create data/raw data/processed data/cache dirs, (3) run alembic upgrade head, (4) pre-download FinBERT model weights (~500MB), (5) verify python -c 'import algotrader' succeeds, (6) create logs/ dir if missing. No install.sh exists currently.
Progress: wrote scripts/bootstrap.py with 8 steps (Python check, dirs, venv, deps, PostgreSQL, FinBERT, smoke tests, summary). Added 'make bootstrap' target to Makefile. Directory creation verified. Cannot test full script in container (no PostgreSQL, no network for pip). Script handles missing PyYAML gracefully.

title: Phase 1: Make AlgoTrader run end-to-end
notes: Audit finding: 527 unit tests pass but system has never run end-to-end. No PostgreSQL, no FinBERT weights, no IBKR TWS connection, no bootstrap script. All 7 subsystems compile and have unit tests but zero integration tests exist. See children for breakdown. Frozen Spec v1.0 is demoted to reference design doc — this bead tree is now the living tracker.

title: Systemd units + runbook for production deployment
notes: No systemd units, no runbook, no install.sh. For production: need orchestrator.service, worker@.service template, logrotate config for logs/algotrader.log. Runbook should cover: starting/stopping, HALT/RESUME procedure, DB backup, IBKR connection troubleshooting, upgrading strategy parameters safely.

title: Reddit/PRAW credentials configuration
notes: config/sentiment.yaml has reddit section with subreddits list but no PRAW credentials. Default behavior has reddit scraper enabled — will crash at runtime without client_id/secret. Either: (1) add credentials to sentiment.yaml with env var interpolation, or (2) disable reddit by default and require explicit opt-in. Twitter already disabled (raises NotImplementedError).

title: Dashboard page tests (5 pages, currently 0 coverage)
notes: Dashboard has 5 pages (home, signals, backtest, calibration, logs) but only 2 test files (config_editor, writer). Pages use Dash callbacks which are hard to test but not impossible with dash.testing. Need: test each page renders without error, test halt/resume callbacks write correct events, test backtest diff view loads prior runs.

title: Config cleanup: remove dead fields, verify schema consistency
notes: Config issues found in audit: (1) strategy_params.yaml may still have commented-out extreme_vol_halt in regime_combo section (was moved to risk.yaml), (2) signals/config_schema.py duplicates RegimeComboParams from shared/config_loader.py, (3) .python-version says 3.11.13 but system runs 3.13.5. Verify all 5 YAML files load cleanly via get_config().

title: Write integration tests (cross-module DB roundtrip)
notes: Spec §9.1 requires tests/integration/ with cross-module DB roundtrip. Currently zero integration tests. All 527 tests are unit tests with mocks. Need: (1) test S2 writes OHLCV then S3 reads it, (2) test S3 writes signals then S6 reads them, (3) test S1 job lifecycle from creation to completion, (4) test event handler picks up dashboard events.

title: Dry-run S2→S5→S3 pipeline on real data
notes: After DB, FinBERT, and credentials are ready: run S2 (ingest OHLCV for one ticker), S5 (run sentiment on scraped news), S3 (generate signals), verify pipeline writes correct rows to jobs/signals tables. Then run S4 backtest on same data. This is the first end-to-end smoke test. Expect breakages — document them as new child issues.

title: Go migration: S1 orchestrator + S6 execution engine
notes: Go scaffolding exists in cmd/, internal/, pkg/ but is placeholder only. Targets: S1 orchestrator (goroutine/channel concurrency for process supervision) and S6 execution engine (GIL-free async IO for TWS API). Defer until Python pipeline is stable on paper. JSON contracts in contracts/ define job_token and system_event schemas.
